title: core: icmpv6.rs and udp.rs duplicate checksum code
description: In icmpv6.rs:106-151 and udp.rs:171-224, oc_add(), sum_words(), and checksum computation are copy-pasted. The only difference is the Next Header constant (58 vs 17). Factor into a shared checksum module with generic upper_layer_checksum(src, dst, next_header, payload).
